reason: D-FF from JK requires J=D and K=D', so one inverter (NOT gate) is added.
0xE0+0xC0 = 224+192 = 416 = 1_1010_0000b; 8-bit sum 1010 0000 with carry-out 1 (unsigned overflow; no 2's-complement signed overflow since -32+-64=-96 fits).

WATS = Wide Area Telephone Service, a real telecom/communication service; DDT and DTS are not. (Weak item: DDD = Direct Distance Dialing is arguably also a telephone service, so the stem is ambiguous.)

Clustering arises when multiple keys map to the same/adjacent hash addresses. Item is imprecise: A is literally the definition of a COLLISION, and B describes open-addressing probing which is what actually produces primary clustering; A is the best of a bad set.
Server IP config is already verified OK, so the next step is to test the path from the client: tracert host->server localizes where the path breaks. (A/B are vaguely worded partial steps.)
T (toggle) flip-flop is the canonical counter element; JK with J=K=1 also toggles but T is the standard answer.
Circular data paths on a disc are called tracks (sectors are subdivisions of a track).
Quicksort has the best average-case constant factors / in-practice performance among the listed general-purpose sorts. (Debatable: heapsort is O(n log n) worst-case vs quicksort's O(n^2).)
Compiled and ran with clang++: prints 543 (5, 4, 3 then break).
ARP maps a known IP address to the corresponding MAC address (reverse direction is RARP).
IEEE 802 MAC (EUI-48) address is 6 bytes = 48 bits.
MAC addressing belongs to the Media Access Control sublayer of OSI layer 2, the Data Link layer.
ATM uses a fixed 53-byte cell (5-byte header + 48-byte payload).
BST invariant: node key > all keys in its left subtree and < all keys in its right subtree.
Random access memory locations are individually selected by a unique address; True.
RAM loses contents on power-off, i.e. it is volatile.
Oracle was the top-ranked DBMS at the time; Linux is an OS, not a DBMS.
A LAN is a network, not a computer; the other three are computers.
Read the K-map figure: entire x3=0 row (minterms 0,1,3,2) is 1 and entire x3=1 row (4,5,7,6) is 0, so F = NOT x3.
